why_it_matters: Family history is standard in a comprehensive exam and informs cardiovascular, diabetes, and cancer risk stratification for this obese young adult.
Uninsured status affects feasibility of referrals, follow-up, and testing, directly shaping the care plan.
The GAD-7 score documents the anxiety assessment already claimed and confirms minimal symptoms, but its normal value has little management impact.
Routine post-vaccination soreness advice is standard aftercare and its omission is unlikely to affect outcomes.
